description.example: A beautiful sunset over the ocean

folder_recursive.description: FolderRecursive controls whether FolderPath matches descendants (default true) or direct contents only.

source.description:
Source identifies who created the tag link, e.g. "manual" for
user-added tags or "zeroshot" for AI-generated ones. Manual tags are
the only ones the UI lets the user remove.

root_id.description:
RootID identifies a registered Storage Location. Empty selects the
configured default location. Clients never submit an arbitrary root path.

warnings.description:
Warnings are non-fatal notes about the chosen location, such as it being
inside a cloud-sync folder. The repository was created regardless.

path.description:
Path is only populated for admin callers; repository filesystem
locations are never exposed to regular users.

status.description:
Status lets a selector keep an unreachable repository visible as a browse
filter while refusing it as an upload target.

faces.description:
Faces re-parents face_items onto the keeper. Only applied for exact
duplicate groups (the service enforces this constraint).

include_originals.description:
IncludeOriginals tells the viewer whether per-asset original downloads
are available (GetPublicShareOriginal requires both this and
AllowDownload); it is a policy flag, not sensitive.

next_registration_role.description:
NextRegistrationRole is the role the next /auth/register will assign
("admin" while no admin exists yet, "user" afterwards). Folds the former
/auth/bootstrap-status semantics into the unified setup status.

image_attribution.example: (c) Ramesh Shenai Jr., some rights reserved (CC BY), uploaded by Ramesh Shenai Jr.

wikipedia_summary.example: The barasingha, also called swamp deer, is a deer species distributed in the Indian subcontinent.

dto.StackPreviewDTO.description: Stack fields (populated when stack mode is enabled)

stack_cover.description: Whether this asset is the cover of its stack

stack_size.description: Number of members in the stack

repository_id.description:
RepositoryID is optional; the primary repository is used when it is empty,
mirroring the upload endpoints.

message.example: File received and queued for processing

BearerAuth.description: Type "Bearer" followed by a space and JWT token.
BearerAuth.name: Authorization

info.description: Media management system API with asset features
info.title: Lumilio-Photos API

get.description: Get aggregated processing activity per queue, including recent error samples

parameters.description: Recent error samples per queue (default: 5, max: 20)
parameters.name: error_limit

get.description: Get aggregated statistics about jobs by state

post.description: Send a query to agent and receive streaming responses via SSE. Manages conversation threads.
Resume a conversation from an interrupt point (e.g., user confirmation for a tool call)

get.description: List all pinned widgets for the current user, in creation order.

post.description: Copy a session ref into a durable board widget. Live mode replays the producing plan on hydration when replayable; otherwise the pin freezes the snapshot.

patch.description: Persist the board grid placement for one or more pins.

delete.description: Remove a pinned widget from the board.

get.description: Get metadata and facet summary for a pinned widget. Frozen pins serve the stored snapshot; live pins replay their plan before facets are computed.

patch.description: Patch one pinned widget. Send title to rename it, widget to switch which view it renders through; both are optional.

get.description: Get a page of assets for a pinned widget. Frozen pins serve the stored snapshot; live pins replay their plan.

post.description: Query a pinned widget with the same list/filter/sort semantics as the assets gallery. Snapshot-order hydration remains available through GET /agent/pins/{id}/assets.
Search a pinned widget with optional top results enhancement and filename fallback, constrained to the pin's asset set.

get.description: Get metadata and facet summary for an agent ref. Refs are scoped to the requesting user and thread.
Get a page of assets for an agent ref, in snapshot order.
Get the agent tools visible in the given quick-action mode. An empty or unknown mode returns the full toolset.

parameters.description: Number of results to skip for pagination
parameters.name: offset

post.description: Create a new album for the authenticated user

post.description: Upload a single photo, video, audio file, or document to the system. The file is staged in a repository and queued for processing.

requestBody.description: Asset file to upload | Repository UUID (uses default repository if not provided)

400.description: Bad request - no file provided or parse error

post.description: Unified batch upload endpoint that supports both small files and chunked large files. Field names should follow format: single_{session_id} for single files or chunk_{session_id}_{index}_{total} for chunks.

requestBody.description: Repository UUID (uses default repository if not provided) | Single file upload - use format: single_{session_id} | Chunked file upload - use format: chunk_{session_id}_{index}_{total}

400.description: Bad request - no files provided or parse error

post.summary: Batch upload assets with chunk support

Get backend ingest lifecycle state for upload task IDs owned by the current caller
Get detailed progress information for upload sessions

post.summary: Create or resume an upload session

post.description: Serve original files for the requested asset IDs as a zip archive.

get.description: Return the shared repository registry for browse-scope/upload selectors and indexing filters. Paths are only included for admins.
Return indexing coverage and queued job counts for photo AI tasks.
Get all assets that have been liked/favorited

post.description: Unified endpoint for listing, filtering, and searching assets. Replaces separate /filter and /search endpoints.

get.description: Return lightweight paginated photo records containing only map-related fields (asset ID, filename, times, GPS lat/lon).

post.description: Given client-computed BLAKE3 fingerprints, reports advisory candidates. Candidates must still be uploaded for server-side full-file verification.

post.description: Authenticate user with username and password. Returns an MFA challenge instead of session tokens when TOTP is enabled.

Identifier-first capability probe. Always returns password:true for valid usernames; passkey:true only when the active account has at least one passkey. Does not reveal TOTP enrollment. Unknown and inactive usernames match the password-only shape.
Revoke the user's refresh token

get.description: Get information about the currently authenticated user
Generate a short-lived media token for image/video/audio URL authorization in browser media elements.
Get the authenticated user's MFA status, including TOTP enablement and remaining recovery codes.
List the authenticated user's enrolled passkeys.

post.description: Create WebAuthn registration options to add a new passkey to the authenticated account.
Verify a passkey enrollment response and attach the new passkey to the authenticated account.

delete.description: Delete one enrolled passkey for the authenticated user.

post.description: Generate a fresh set of recovery codes for the authenticated user.
Disable TOTP MFA and invalidate recovery codes for the authenticated user.
Verify a TOTP setup code and enable TOTP MFA for the authenticated user.

400.description: Invalid setup token or verification code

post.description: Generate a new TOTP secret and setup token for the authenticated user.
Verify a pending MFA login challenge with a TOTP code or recovery code.
Create WebAuthn login options for a username-first passkey login flow.
Verify a passkey login assertion and issue session tokens.
Replace a temporary reset password using the short-lived token returned by login.

401.description: Invalid or expired password change token

post.description: Generate a new access token using a valid refresh token
Create a new account from a username and password and issue session tokens. MFA (TOTP/passkey) is optional and added afterwards.

get.description: Return a de-sensitized view of backend ML and LLM runtime capabilities without exposing secrets.

post.description: Embed positive/negative prompts with semantic and return library assets whose contrastive score exceeds the threshold. Used to tune prompts and thresholds before persisting a smart album. Requires the semantic embedding pipeline and a reachable semantic text-embed task.

get.description: List configured cloud credentials without exposing secrets.

post.description: Authenticate with a cloud provider and save a repo-reusable credential. Provider-specific challenges return auth_status=challenge_required.

delete.description: Permanently delete a cloud credential, its session data, and unbind associated repositories.

post.description: Submit challenge inputs to complete cloud credential creation.
Pause a cloud credential so it cannot start new imports. Can be reconnected later.
Re-authenticate a disconnected or errored credential. If no password is provided, attempts to reuse the existing session.

get.description: Return a cloud import run by ID.
List cloud provider descriptors for credential creation.

post.description: Deprecated. Use repo-scoped cloud import endpoints instead.
Rebuilds the pending duplicate graph for a repository by combining exact-hash and pHash edges.

get.description: Paginated list of duplicate groups, scoped by repository and status (default pending).
Returns one duplicate group with all assets and evidence edges.

post.description: Marks a duplicate group as dismissed without merging any assets.
Keeps the chosen asset, unions metadata from duplicates, and soft-deletes the remaining members.

get.description: Returns counts and recoverable space for pending duplicate groups, scoped by optional repository_id.

parameters.description: Repository UUID to scope the summary
parameters.name: repository_id

get.description: Check if the server is healthy
Return paginated persisted photo location clusters with cached labels when available.

post.description: Queue a location cluster rebuild for all photos or one repository.

parameters.description: Include people hidden from the default grid
parameters.name: include_hidden

post.description: Rebuild recognized people for the selected repository scope using HDBSCAN over face embeddings.

patch.description: Rename a recognized person. Successful updates mark the person as confirmed.

post.description: List assets scoped to a specific person while reusing the unified asset query filters.

put.description: Set the representative cover face for a person. The face must belong to the person.

Serve the face crop image for a single face belonging to a person.

post.description: Reassign a single face from this person to another person as a manual correction.
Detach a face from this person, leaving the original asset unchanged.

put.description: Hide or unhide a person from the default people grid. Faces, assets and names are preserved.

post.description: Merge one or more source people into the target person. Assets remain in the library and corrections become manual.

404.description: Share not found or no longer available

post.description: Browse a public share's assets in date order. v1 is browse-only: no filter/search/sort.

404.description: Share not found or no longer available

403.description: Original downloads are not enabled for this share

post.description: Serve the share's original files (optionally scoped to a subset via asset_ids) as a zip archive. Requires allow_download to be enabled.

403.description: Downloads are not enabled for this share

get.description: Return all registered repositories.

post.description: Create a repository folder under a registered Storage Location. Empty root_id selects the configured default. If the target already contains a .lumiliorepo file, it is registered instead.

delete.description: Remove a repository from the registry. Does not delete files on disk.

get.description: Return a single repository.

patch.description: Update mutable repository fields (name, storage_strategy, local_settings, default_owner_id).

get.description: Return cloud credential binding and latest import run for a repository.

post.description: Start an import run for the repository's configured cloud credential.
Queue a manual scan for a repository free workspace.

get.description: List recent scan runs for a repository.
Return the latest scan run for a repository.

post.description: Merges RAW/JPEG and Live Photo components into logical media items, then detects burst presentation stacks

get.description: Return registered repository roots with their current reachability. Filesystem paths are admin-only through this route.
List database dumps (routine backups and restore points), newest first.

post.description: Enqueue an immediate database dump; it appears in the list when the job finishes.

delete.description: Delete one dump file from the backups directory.

get.description: Download one dump file as gzip.

post.description: Restore the named dump. A restore point of the current database is taken first; on failure the database is rolled back automatically. Synchronous — the response arrives when the restore has finished.

409.description: Another restore is already in progress

get.description: Read-only effective runtime-immutable configuration (changed only via TOML + restart).
Return persisted system settings without exposing secret values.

patch.description: Update persisted system settings. API keys are write-only and never returned.

post.description: Validate the persisted LLM configuration by issuing a lightweight test request.
Run first-run bootstrapping: generate and rotate the database credential, then persist the secret. Refused once the system is already initialized.

get.description: Report whether Lumilio has rotated the temporary database credential. The web frontend runs setup as a preflight while uninitialized.
List all share links owned by the current user, newest first.

post.description: Resolve a source into an asset snapshot and create a revocable, time-limited public share link. The raw token is returned only in this response.

delete.description: Permanently remove a share link record. Only expired or revoked links may be deleted.

400.description: Share link must be expired or revoked first

get.description: Get one share link's metadata (never the token).

patch.description: Patch a share link's title/description/download settings, and/or extend its expiry by extend_days.

post.description: Immediately disable public access for a share link.

parameters.description: iNaturalist locale for localized common names and wiki summaries
parameters.name: locale

parameters.name: days

get.description: Get distribution of commonly used focal lengths
Get shooting time distribution by hour or month
List users with ownership statistics for administrator management views.

patch.description: Verify the current password, set a new password, and revoke all refresh tokens for the current user.
Update the current user's profile fields such as display name and avatar photo.
Update user identity, role, status, and avatar fields as an administrator.

post.description: Generate a temporary password, require a password change on next login, invalidate existing sessions, and clear passkeys, TOTP, and recovery codes for a user.
